q4.rationale: Weights are the final-day allocation from a real A2C policy (upstream FinRL's own DRLAgent wrapping stable_baselines3.A2C), trained live for 3000 timesteps on NVDA, SPY, QQQ, JPM, GLD's real yfinance history from 2024-12-05 to 2026-06-08 (upstream's own StockPortfolioEnv reward = portfolio value, upstream's own softmax weight normalization — no pretrained checkpoint was available or used). Trailing 30-day equal-weight realized return -0.03% → heuristic regime label SIDEWAYS.
